creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 220900
Patch for php73

Use pkg-config (pkgconfig) to detect freetype(2)
Patch obtained from Arch Linux

Reference:
https://aur.archlinux.org/cgit/aur.git/tree/freetype.patch?h=php73

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #0 r367711 (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
